title: New email for requests for cost limit increases in contempt cases
body: "As part of a review of the contempt of court guidance we are moving the consideration of cost increases to the Magistrates Billing team as they have more expertise, understanding, and existing processes for authorising the more expensive cases.  The published guidance will be updated and take effect from Monday 3 February 2025.  The new email address to send requests for a cost limit to be increased is CNTP.extensions@justice.gov.uk  For guidance on the funding of civil contempt, how to apply, and how to get paid see Apply for legal aid for civil contempt cases "
